title: Moroccan Flatbread
description: A traditional moroccan flatbread made with sour flour, perfect for serving with your favorite moroccan dishes. This recipe is gluten-free.

ingredients.name: Sour flour
ingredients.notes: Make sure to use a gluten-free sour flour

ingredients.name: Moroccan crumbly
ingredients.notes: This adds a nice texture to the flatbread

ingredients.name: Water
ingredients.notes: Adjust as needed to achieve a smooth dough

instructions: 1. In a large mixing bowl, combine sour flour and moroccan crumbly.
2. Gradually add water and mix until a smooth dough forms.
3. Knead the dough for 5-7 minutes until it becomes elastic.
4. Divide the dough into 2-3 equal portions, depending on how large you want your flatbreads to be.
5. Roll out each portion into a thin circle, about 6-8 inches in diameter.
6. Heat a non-stick skillet or griddle over medium-high heat.
7. Cook the flatbread for 1-2 minutes on each side, until it's lightly browned and puffed up.
8. Remove from heat and serve warm.
